d:
Passive. When a battle starts, Contess hides within her rulebook. While hidden, she cannot move or act, cannot be targeted by enemies, and recovers [[66]] Energy every second.
She enters the battlefield when her Energy is full, when an enemy violates a rule, or when all other allies are defeated.
Active. Contess restores [[666%]]<ATK> HP to a target ally and grants them Exemption.
Exemption: Prevents the target ally from being punished by allied Contess for rule violations. While the ally's HP ratio is above [[40%]], they lose [[2.5%]] of their max HP every second, converting [[200%]] of the lost amount into a shield. The shield value cannot exceed [[100%]] of the ally's max HP. While this shield is active, the ally's ATK is increased by [[30%]].
When auto battle is enabled, this skill prioritizes the ally with the most cumulative damage dealt who has not yet received Exemption. If all allies have already received Exemption, it instead targets the [[weakest]] ally.
When an ally loses HP from Exemption's HP reduction effect, the shield conversion ratio increases to [[225%]] of the lost HP.
When an ally loses HP from Exemption's HP reduction effect, the shield conversion ratio increases to [[250%]] of the lost HP.
When an ally loses HP from Exemption's HP reduction effect, the shield conversion ratio increases to [[275%]] of the lost HP.
When an ally loses HP from Exemption's HP reduction effect, the shield conversion ratio increases to [[300%]] of the lost HP.

While Contess is on the battlefield, she disciplines those who violate school rules, reducing their max HP by [[6.6%]]. Max HP reduced cannot exceed [[100%]]<ATK>.
Code of Conduct - Be Civil
When a unit on the battlefield loses [[60%]] max HP or shield value in total (the lost amount cannot exceed [[150%]] of the initial Team ATK), the enemy unit that contributed the most damage to that loss is deemed in violation of this rule. Each unit may violate this rule [[5]] times within [[10]]s.
If the unit violating this rule is an ally, Contess also heals the allied unit for [[200%]]<ATK> HP in addition to the punishment.
In Boss battles, this rule is enforced differently: Every [[10]]s, the unit with the most cumulative damage dealt on each side is considered in violation of this rule.
Active. Contess restores [[150%]]<ATK> HP to the 2 [[weakest]] allies, and reduces the ATK of the 2 enemies with the most cumulative damage dealt by [[25%]] for [[6]]s.
Increases the healing amount for allies to [[180%]]<ATK> when the skill is actively used.
Increases the healing amount for allies to [[210%]]<ATK> when the skill is actively used.
Increases the healing amount for allies to [[240%]]<ATK> when the skill is actively used.

Code of Conduct - Be Quiet
Whenever a unit casts their Ultimate, that unit is deemed in violation of this rule. A unit may only violate this rule once every [[6]]s.
Active. Contess reduces Energy recovery efficiency by [[14%]] for the 2 enemies who have cast the most Ultimates. This effect lasts [[6]]s.
Reduces enemies' Energy recovery efficiency by [[16%]].
Reduces enemies' Energy recovery efficiency by [[18%]].
Reduces enemies' Energy recovery efficiency by [[20%]].

When an enemy violates a school rule, Contess permanently reduces their ATK by [[2%]] and Energy recovery efficiency by [[1%]]. The reductions from this effect cannot exceed [[10%]] for ATK and [[5%]] for Energy recovery efficiency.

When an enemy violates a school rule, Contess permanently reduces their ATK by [[3%]] and Energy recovery efficiency by [[2%]]. The reductions from this effect cannot exceed [[15%]] for ATK and [[10%]] for Energy recovery efficiency.

When an enemy violates a school rule, Contess permanently reduces their ATK by [[4%]] and Energy recovery efficiency by [[3%]]. The reductions from this effect cannot exceed [[20%]] for ATK and [[15%]] for Energy recovery efficiency.

Contess permanently expels a unit when they're punished more than [[6]] times. Expelled units are permanently silenced, even if they are unaffected (ineffective against Bosses), and take [[18%]] more HP loss. Allies granted Exemption by Contess are not affected by this effect.
Expelled units take [[20%]] more HP loss.
Expelled units take [[22%]] more HP loss.
Permanently expelled enemies lose [[30%]]<ATK> HP per second, and [[40%]] of the HP lost this way is converted into healing for Contess and her allies with Exemption.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first time an ally's HP drops below [[40%]], restores [[160%]]<ATK> HP to them and grants them a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d:
In regular battles, Contess stuns enemies who violate Code of Conduct - Be Civil for [[2]]s, and silences enemies who violate Code of Conduct - Be Quiet for [[6]]s.
In Boss battles, Contess punishes enemies who violate a school rule one extra time.
